message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #DDDDDD
  ArrowColor #000000
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFED6
  NoteBorderColor #666666
}

participant "客户端" as Client
participant "AMS" as AMS
participant "UserControl" as UC

Client -> AMS : registerUserSwitchObserver\n(IUserSwitchObserver)
note left of Client
注册回调接口
end note

AMS -> UC : registerUserSwitchObserver\n(IUserSwitchObserver)

Client -> AMS : switchUser()
AMS --> UC : startUser()

note right of AMS
执行切换用户动作，发送REPORT_USER_SWITCH_MSG
end note

UC -> UC : dispatchUserSwitch

UC -> Client : IUserSwitchObserver.\nonUserSwitching(newUserId,callback)

note left of Client
通知客户端处理完用户切换后回调传递的callback来通知AMS
end note

Client --> UC : IRemoteCallback.sendResult()

note left of Client
等待所有客户端处理完成之后继续进行切换用户的工作
end note

UC -> UC : continueUserSwitch()

note left of UC
结束冻屏，并停止在后台的访客用户
end note

UC -> UC : dispatchUserSwitchComplete()

note left of UC
通过回调方法通知客户端进行用户切换的收尾工作
end note

UC -> Client : IUserSwitchObserver.\nonUserSwitchComplete(userId)

@enduml
```
